name: ccc-team-skills
description: CCC Team Session Skills for multi-pane tmux workflows. Provides ccc-interpane for inter-pane messaging and ccc-team-session for team session management.

skills.name: ccc-interpane
skills.description: Inter-pane communication for 3-pane team sessions via @mentions and tmux

skills.name: ccc-team-session
skills.description: Team session creation and management for 3-pane workflows
